body_txt: A standard for any setting where there's a chance of contamination, usually by an alien virus , is a chamber where people and objects are either sprayed with some cleaning agent or hit with a huge dose of UV-light to disinfect them. Also, since decontamination usually means stripping and scrubbing, it also gives a chance for Fanservice , humor or both. Hazmat Suits are often involved with it. Compare Purification Bathing , Metal Detector Checkpoint , and Our Showers Are Different .
